hierarchy.hero_wordmark: text-[15vw] md:text-[18vw] leading-none tracking-tighter font-medium text-[#0A0A0A]
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#0A0A0A]
hierarchy.mono_small: font-mono text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#666666]

navigation.design: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-white border border-[#EAEAEA] rounded-full px-8 py-4 flex items-center gap-8 z-50 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#111111] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#EAEAEA] px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#F5F5F5] transition-colors

inputs.waitlist_email: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#EAEAEA] focus:border-[#0A0A0A] py-4 md:py-6 text-xl md:text-3xl outline-none placeholder:text-[#EAEAEA] transition-colors text-center md:text-left

hero.layout: min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden
elements: Positioning statement: 'Performance Intelligence for Modern Websites.'
Background: Absolute positioned div with low-opacity (opacity-5) tech keywords floating.

problem_statement.layout: Massive typography block, generous negative space
problem_statement.content: Most tools show diagnostics. Few explain what matters most.

what_it_is_flow.layout: Horizontal step flow or massive flex text. Audit → Prioritize → Understand → Fix → Monitor
what_it_is_flow.design: Use Geist Mono for arrows, varying text opacity to indicate flow.

product_vision.content: Evolving into Performance Intelligence, Monitoring, Prioritization, Recommendations, Continuous Optimization

future_capabilities.layout: Strict grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 with hairline borders (border-collapse look)

elements: Live Counter: 'X developers on the waitlist' (Real DB count integration required)

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for premium momentum feel.
motion_and_interactions.fades: framer-motion for subtle opacity/y-axis reveals on scroll (initial={opacity:0, y:20} whileInView={opacity:1, y:0}).
motion_and_interactions.background_atmosphere: Use framer-motion to create extremely slow, continuous drifting of the tech keywords (LCP, CLS, INP, etc.) in the hero background. They must be almost invisible (opacity-5).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure primary text meets APCA standards against #FFFFFF.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid (e.g., 'join-waitlist-btn', 'email-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Ensure the 'Ø' character is correctly used in all brand references.
Construct the Waitlist backend using MongoDB without email confirmation, tracking live developer count.

Use Geist font (next/font/local or next/font/google depending on framework, or standard generic if pure React). If using pure React, import Geist from a reliable CDN or use Inter/Satoshi if Geist is unavailable.
Do NOT use glassmorphism, stick to solid colors with clear borders.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card components; build raw div layouts to maintain strict minimalism and editorial grid borders.
The waitlist form should have a clean UI: large text, minimal borders, and show the live count dynamically.
